query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A cyclist wearing a helmet and cycling kit rides a road bicycle in profile view against an open landscape. The rider leans forward over the drop handlebars in an aerodynamic position. The bicycle has thin tires and a visible brand name on the down tube. Trees and fields stretch across the background under an overcast sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A cyclist wearing a helmet and cycling kit rides a road bicycle in profile view with strong horizontal motion blur streaking the background and partially softening the rider's extremities, creating a sense of speed. The black and white image has low tonal separation with crushed midtones that feel heavy and atmospheric. The framing has an informal, snapshot quality with a slightly casual capture energy, and the overall low contrast produces an oppressive, moody tone across the open landscape and overcast sky.
